evidence.scientific_clarity: Flow from 1120 raw → 1000 cleaned → 820 filtered → 600/120/100 splits is clearly legible with widths proportional to counts; rejected flows are visible in grey.
evidence.typography: PDF uses Type 3 DejaVu Sans (not Type 1/TrueType embeds); script never sets pdf.fonttype=42 or rcParams, so text is not selectable/editable vector text — default DejaVu Sans is also used throughout.
evidence.palette: Blue/green/magenta encode stages (not purely directional); grey for rejected is appropriate; however Test node reuses green (#2CA02C) which clashes with Cleaned stage color — colorblind safety not verified.
evidence.layout_density: 10×5.5-inch figure uses space well; node rectangles are well-spaced with small gaps; column labels and node labels are not overlapping; y-range fills the axes appropriately.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content and color encoding; legend is embedded in text labels rather than a separate legend box (acceptable for Sankey); minor issue: 'Reject' node in figure but caption says 'grey=rejected' — consistent.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF contains Type 3 fonts (bitmap-rendered), not scalable Type 1/TrueType; pdf.fonttype=42 is absent from the script, so text is not truly selectable vector text.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs exist (figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py) plus bonus figure.svg; all are non-trivial in size.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption provides specific numerical claims (1120 raw, 1000 pass ingestion, 820 filtered, 600/120/100 splits), explains color encoding, and describes what the reader sees.

overall_strengths: Strong scientific clarity: the Sankey correctly encodes all record counts with proportional flow widths, making the data preparation pipeline immediately readable.
High-quality caption with specific numerical findings and explicit color encoding legend, matching the figure faithfully.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype='none'): the PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type 3 bitmap fonts, making text non-selectable and non-editable in vector editors.

Default DejaVu Sans font used throughout; Test node color (#2CA02C green) conflicts with Cleaned stage color creating potential color confusion, and colorblind safety of the magenta/green/blue combination is not guaranteed.
